text: Hello. Hello. Good afternoon. This is Rachel. So I'm calling because there are pending grocery and cash benefits worth up to $300 available on your Medicare account through Texas state relief program. So have you received any notification about these benefits yet? Well, I really want to help you get this taken care of as these benefits are time sensitive. So you do have Medicare Part A and B, right? Can you hear me? I was just asking if you have Medicare Part A and Part B. So if you could give me a few minutes of yours, I want to tell you about the new benefits that have been introduced with the special enrollment 2026. You can get benefits like food cards and cash back rewards up to $300. It will only take a minute if you'll talk to me.
